title: Electrical Single-Line Diagram
description: The as-designed one-line: array, strings, combiners, inverters, transformers, MV busbar and grid POI.

steps.title: The single-line diagram
steps.description: Drawn from the same sizing that feeds the equipment schedule.
steps.voiceScript: This is the single-line diagram of your plant, drawn from your committed sizing.
steps.captionText: This is the single-line diagram of your plant, drawn from your committed sizing.
steps.fallbackMessage: The single-line diagram: not visible on this page yet.

steps.title: One inverter station
steps.description: The dashed boundary is the typical station, repeated N times.
steps.voiceScript: The dashed boundary shows one typical inverter station, repeated across the plant.
steps.captionText: The dashed boundary shows one typical inverter station, repeated across the plant.
steps.fallbackMessage: One inverter station: not visible on this page yet.

steps.title: Equipment schedule
steps.description: Every stage carries its ratings, protection and standards.
steps.voiceScript: Below the drawing, each stage lists its ratings, protection and the standards applied.
steps.captionText: Below the drawing, each stage lists its ratings, protection and the standards applied.
steps.fallbackMessage: Equipment schedule: not visible on this page yet.

steps.title: Cable schedule
steps.description: Segment, type, size and length for every connection.
steps.voiceScript: The cable schedule gives the type, size and length of every connection.
steps.captionText: The cable schedule gives the type, size and length of every connection.
steps.fallbackMessage: Cable schedule: not visible on this page yet.

steps.title: Print or export
steps.description: The page prints to a clean A4 PDF.
steps.voiceScript: Print the diagram to PDF for your submission pack.
steps.captionText: Print the diagram to PDF for your submission pack.
steps.fallbackMessage: Print or export: not visible on this page yet.
